APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER PINKSTON, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-10-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER MICHAEL PINKSTON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J.
